reach.note: F8 from SA38 initial; identity is report-specific (the executed program's own selection dynpro), so program/dynpro are intentionally empty. Get Variant button = wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[17]; Execute-in-Background menu = wnd[0]/mbar/menu[0]/menu[2]
Shift+F5 (sendVKey 17) on the selection screen opens the SAPLSVAR 'Find Variant' popup. Verified identical on S/4HANA 1909 and ECC (under JA logon).
wnd[0]/mbar/menu[0]/menu[2] (Execute in Background) opens SAPLSPRI 'Background Print Parameters'. Continue (advance) = tbar[0]/btn[13]; Enter does NOT advance. Output device = ctxtPRI_PARAMS-PDEST.
After the print-params Continue, SAPLBTCH 'Start Time' (screen 1010). Immediate = usr/btnSOFORT_PUSH; Save (schedules the job now) = tbar[0]/btn[11].

okcode %PC on a CLASSIC ABAP list. NOT reproduced on S4D or EC2 (RSPARAM renders ALV on both S/4HANA and ECC, so %PC was a no-op). Save-dialog fields DY_PATH/DY_FILENAME are release-stable (confirmed by /sap-sp02). Reliable foreground capture is background->spool via /sap-sp02.
